bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event for Fall 2026 has been announced.

bracu_official.summary: An official notice regarding the award B-113 related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2 has been released.

bracu_official.title: Eid-e-Miladun Nabi - University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will observe Eid-e-Miladun Nabi, leading to the university's closure on August 26th.

bracu_official.title: July Mass Uprising Day
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University acknowledges July Mass Uprising Day on August 5th.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will host a seminar on July 9, 2026, to raise awareness about cervical cancer.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: On July 7, 2026, an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative will be launched at BRAC University to promote sustainable choices.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate was awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney, as announced on July 2, 2026.
